extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard attacked inside final kilometer uphill, held off ULISSI Diego's chase to win and take yellow by 4 seconds.
tactical_patterns: CARAPAZ attacked solo sub-1km on uphill finish, exploiting sprinters' hesitation on gradient to gap organised chase.
EVENEPOEL Remco positioned front over final categorized climb, signaling team willing to control despite sprint finish format.
HAAS Nathan attacked 2.5 years winless with 7km circuits remaining, forcing rivals to organize chase rotation early.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: won from late solo move on uphill finish, took yellow, opportunistic against pure sprinters
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: positive: led organized chase of CARAPAZ, nearly closed gap on uphill sprint despite late response
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: negative: first to chase CARAPAZ but burned out quickly, poor pacing judgment inside final kilometer
rider_signals.HAAS Nathan: neutral: attacked with 7km circuits but caught, still seeking first World Tour win after 2.5 years
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: yellow jersey invisible in finale positioning, nowhere to be seen inside final 2km
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: positioned at front over final categorized climb, showing team control presence
rider_signals.VAN DER HOORN Taco: neutral: in breakaway, attacked over final categorized climb but caught before finale
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: mixed with sprinters on uphill finish, unusual positioning for GC rider suggests confidence
